issues.detail: Party addresses (Ana Silva and Lusitânia Construções, Lda.) are not present in the source document

The statement "MINUTA — CARECE DE REVISÃO POR ADVOGADO" is not supported by either the source document or the computed record.
Address 'Avenida da Liberdade, 123 1200-456 Lisboa' is not present in the source document or computed record.

The draft includes postal addresses for Minho Têxteis, Lda. (Avenida da Indústria, 123, 4700-123 Braga) and Nuno Lopes (Rua das Oliveiras, 45, 4700-456 Braga) which are not present in the source document or computed record.
